summary: Backend-only testing focused on new features: PDF support for /api/invoices/analyze and the new /api/tenants/percentage-summary endpoint. Extended /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py with 4 new pytest tests (PDF with proper content-type, PDF detected via %PDF- magic bytes only, percentage-summary with multi-tenant aggregation + property_id exclusion, and shape/dict guarantees). All 11 tests pass (7 regression + 4 new). Verified _id never leaked, AI flow continues to work for both JPEG and PDF, PyMuPDF first-page rendering reaches GPT-4o vision successfully, and percentage-summary correctly excludes tenants without property_id.

minor.issue: Route order is correct (declared before /tenants/{tenant_id}), but a future refactor could accidentally shadow it; consider an explicit comment or pin the order.

If PyMuPDF is unavailable the endpoint returns 500 (correct). However, when fitz raises an unexpected exception the server still does doc.close() implicitly via GC; minor but consider try/finally to ensure resource release on multi-page edge cases.
Pre-existing: image_base64 is capped at 200000 chars before persist (silent truncation). Not a regression.

critical_code_review_comments: /api/tenants/percentage-summary correctly excludes empty/missing property_id and aggregates per property. Returns plain dict (not Pydantic model) which is fine but consider typing the response (Dict[str, float]).
PDF detection logic in analyze_invoice is robust (content-type OR filename OR %PDF- magic bytes) - matches requirements.
fitz.Matrix(2,2) ~150dpi is reasonable for OCR via vision; multi-page PDFs are silently dropped after page 0 (acceptable for invoices, but document this).
Server still 533 lines single file - acceptable; revisit modularization if more endpoints land.
ImageContent + UserMessage flow is correct for emergentintegrations gpt-4o.
No regression risk: all existing CRUD/cascade/AI tests continue to pass.
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own TEST_-prefixed properties/tenants/invoices and clean up in finally blocks. Pre-existing seed data untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 backend tests pass. New tests cover: (1) PDF upload with application/pdf content-type, (2) PDF upload with octet-stream content-type detected only via %PDF- magic bytes, (3) percentage-summary multi-property aggregation with no-property exclusion, (4) percentage-summary shape/dict guarantees. Reportlab installed (pip) for generating real test PDFs. PyMuPDF (fitz) is the PDF->image bridge. Re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA - all features working as specified.
